findings.description: Property name `sendProcessIdColumnName` is explicitly stated in No.18 content ("プロパティ名：sendProcessIdColumnName") but is absent from s1 hints. Users searching for this configuration property name would not find this section.
findings.source_evidence: No.18: プロパティ名：sendProcessIdColumnName / プロパティ説明：メール送信要求管理テーブルのメール送信プロセスIDカラムの名前

findings.description: Directive name `required-decimal-point` is mentioned in No.11 as the subject of a bug fix but is absent from s1 hints. Users searching for this format definition directive would not reach this section.
findings.source_evidence: No.11: required-decimal-pointディレクティブをフォーマット定義ファイルに指定し、符号なし数値でも設定が有効となるように修正しました。
